name: Chocolate Cherry Upside Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the cake flour, sugar, salt, baking soda, and cocoa powder.
2. In a separate bowl, mix oil, vanilla extract, and water until well combined.
3. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
4. Pour 3/4 cup of cherry pie filling into the bottom of a greased microwave-safe bundt cake dish.
5. Spread the remaining cherry pie filling evenly over the batter in the dish.
6. Place the dish in the microwave and bake for 9 minutes at 50% power.
7. Carefully turn the dish out onto a serving plate (the cake will be fragile).
8. Allow the cake to cool in the dish with a towel covering it for 1-2 minutes before removing the towel.
9. Serve immediately.
